criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance learning experiences.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, official websites, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and engagement facilitated by the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app analytics, engagement metrics.

criteria.name: Educational Impact
criteria.description: The effectiveness of the app in improving educational outcomes.
criteria.sources: Educational studies, user testimonials, performance metrics.

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: The app's availability across different platforms and its ease of use for diverse user groups.
criteria.sources: App availability, user reviews, accessibility features.

criteria.name: Innovative Features
criteria.description: The presence of unique and innovative features that distinguish the app from others.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, user reviews, industry analyses.
